overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1219 layer, assign Release 1220, and load the Living Room museum
Add fixed display surfaces, real-object registry, provenance, synthesis, theft evidence, recap, and persistence

preserved_canonical_state: the canonical trophy case and OTVAL-FROB remain the only house scoring authority
every displayed item is the original real object and remains removable through ordinary parser actions
nested object trees move only with their real root container and are never flattened or duplicated
fixed museum surfaces add no treasure, score, alternate solution, or puzzle completion
active field objects remain behaviorally active and are explicitly described as non-retired
museum theft moves one real unsecured valuable into the canonical thief inventory for canonical recovery
Release 1219 house state and every earlier qualified layer remain unchanged
excluded_scope: duplicate display records or cloned treasures
parallel museum score or automatic trophy-case credit
universal provenance database or transcript archive
Kitchen, Cellar, visitor, dream, playback, death recovery, armor, or Zork Plus machinery
